1вҶ’package com.formfiller.ime
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’/**
     4вҶ’ * д»Һж–Үжң¬дёӯжҸҗеҸ–жі•еҫӢж–Үд№Ұеёёи§Ғеӯ—ж®өпјҲе§“еҗҚгҖҒиә«д»ҪиҜҒгҖҒз”өиҜқгҖҒең°еқҖгҖҒе…¬еҸёпјү
     5вҶ’ */
     6вҶ’object FieldExtractor {
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’    data class ExtractedField(val label: String, val value: String, val type: String)
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’    private val patterns = listOf(
    11вҶ’        Triple("иә«д»ҪиҜҒеҸ·", """(?:иә«д»ҪиҜҒ[еҸ·з Ғ]*|иҜҒд»¶еҸ·[з Ғ]*)[пјҡ:\s]*(\d{17}[\dXx])""", "id_number"),
    12вҶ’        Triple("иә«д»ҪиҜҒеҸ·", """(?<!\d)\d{17}[\dXx](?!\d)""", "id_number"),
    13вҶ’        Triple("жүӢжңәеҸ·", """(?:жүӢжңә|з”өиҜқ|иҒ”зі»ж–№ејҸ|иҒ”зі»з”өиҜқ|з§»еҠЁз”өиҜқ)[пјҡ:\s]*(1[3-9]\d{9})""", "phone"),
    14вҶ’        Triple("жүӢжңәеҸ·", """(?<!\d)1[3-9]\d{9}(?!\d)""", "phone"),
    15вҶ’        Triple("еӣәе®ҡз”өиҜқ", """(?<!\d)(0\d{2,3}-?\d{7,8})(?!\d)""", "phone"),
    16вҶ’        Triple("йӮ®зј–", """(?:йӮ®[ж”ҝзј–][зј–з Ғ]*)[пјҡ:\s]*(\d{6})""", "postal"),
    17вҶ’        Triple("ең°еқҖ", """(?:дҪҸжүҖең°|ең°еқҖ|дҪҸеқҖ|дҪҸжүҖ)[пјҡ:\s]*([^\nпјҢ,гҖӮпјӣ;]{5,50})""", "address"),
    18вҶ’        Triple("е…¬еҸё", """([\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2,20}(?:жңүйҷҗе…¬еҸё|иӮЎд»Ҫжңүйҷҗе…¬еҸё|йӣҶеӣў|дәӢеҠЎжүҖ))""", "company"),
    19вҶ’    )
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’    private val rolePatterns = listOf(
    22вҶ’        """(?:еҺҹе‘Ҡ|з”іиҜ·дәә)[пјҡ:\sпјҲ(]*([^\nпјҢ,гҖӮпјӣ;пјү)]{2,20})""",
    23вҶ’        """(?:иў«е‘Ҡ|иў«з”іиҜ·дәә)[пјҡ:\sпјҲ(]*([^\nпјҢ,гҖӮпјӣ;пјү)]{2,20})""",
    24вҶ’        """(?:е§”жүҳд»ЈзҗҶдәә|д»ЈзҗҶдәә)[пјҡ:\sпјҲ(]*([^\nпјҢ,гҖӮпјӣ;пјү)]{2,20})""",
    25вҶ’        """(?:жі•е®ҡд»ЈиЎЁдәә)[пјҡ:\sпјҲ(]*([^\nпјҢ,гҖӮпјӣ;пјү)]{2,20})""",
    26вҶ’    )
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’    private val roleLabels = listOf("еҺҹе‘Ҡ", "иў«е‘Ҡ", "е§”жүҳд»ЈзҗҶдәә", "жі•е®ҡд»ЈиЎЁдәә")
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’    fun extract(text: String): List<ExtractedField> {
    31вҶ’        val results = mutableListOf<ExtractedField>()
    32вҶ’        val seen = mutableSetOf<String>()
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’        // жҸҗеҸ–еӣәе®ҡжЁЎејҸеӯ—ж®ө
    35вҶ’        for ((label, pattern, type) in patterns) {
    36вҶ’            val regex = Regex(pattern)
    37вҶ’            for (m in regex.findAll(text)) {
    38вҶ’                val value = (if (m.groupValues.size > 1 && m.groupValues[1].isNotEmpty()) m.groupValues[1] else m.value).trim()
    39вҶ’                if (value.isNotEmpty() && seen.add(value)) {
    40вҶ’                    results.add(ExtractedField(label, value, type))
    41вҶ’                }
    42вҶ’            }
    43вҶ’        }
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’        // жҸҗеҸ–и§’иүІе§“еҗҚ
    46вҶ’        for ((i, pattern) in rolePatterns.withIndex()) {
    47вҶ’            val regex = Regex(pattern)
    48вҶ’            for (m in regex.findAll(text)) {
    49вҶ’                val name = m.groupValues[1].trim()
    50вҶ’                if (name.length in 2..5 && seen.add(name) && looksLikeName(name)) {
    51вҶ’                    results.add(ExtractedField(roleLabels[i], name, "name"))
    52вҶ’                }
    53вҶ’            }
    54вҶ’        }
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’        return results
    57вҶ’    }

1вҶ’package com.formfiller.ime
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’import com.formfiller.data.Field
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’/**
     6вҶ’ * ж №жҚ®иҫ“е…ҘжЎҶзҡ„ hint/label еҢ№й…ҚжңҖеҗҲйҖӮзҡ„еӯ—ж®ө
     7вҶ’ */
     8вҶ’object FieldMatcher {
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’    fun match(hint: String?, fields: List<Field>): List<Field> {
    11вҶ’        if (hint.isNullOrBlank()) return fields
    12вҶ’        val h = hint.lowercase()
    13вҶ’        val matched = fields.filter { matchScore(h, it) > 0 }.sortedByDescending { matchScore(h, it) }
    14вҶ’        return if (matched.isNotEmpty()) matched else fields
    15вҶ’    }
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’    private fun matchScore(hint: String, field: Field): Int {
    18вҶ’        val type = field.fieldType
    19вҶ’        val label = field.label.lowercase()
    20вҶ’        // жҢүеӯ—ж®өзұ»еһӢеҢ№й…Қ
    21вҶ’        val typeScore = when (type) {
    22вҶ’            "name" -> if (hint.containsAny("е§“еҗҚ", "name", "з§°")) 10 else 0
    23вҶ’            "id_number" -> if (hint.containsAny("иә«д»ҪиҜҒ", "иҜҒд»¶", "id")) 10 else 0
    24вҶ’            "phone" -> if (hint.containsAny("жүӢжңә", "з”өиҜқ", "phone", "tel", "иҒ”зі»")) 10 else 0
    25вҶ’            "address" -> if (hint.containsAny("ең°еқҖ", "дҪҸжүҖ", "address", "дҪҸеқҖ")) 10 else 0
    26вҶ’            "company" -> if (hint.containsAny("е…¬еҸё", "еҚ•дҪҚ", "company", "дјҒдёҡ", "жңәжһ„")) 10 else 0
    27вҶ’            else -> 0
    28вҶ’        }
    29вҶ’        // жҢү label ж–Үжң¬еҢ№й…Қ
    30вҶ’        val labelScore = if (hint.contains(label) || label.contains(hint)) 5 else 0
    31вҶ’        return typeScore + labelScore
    32вҶ’    }
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’    private fun String.containsAny(vararg keywords: String) = keywords.any { this.contains(it) }
    35вҶ’}

Based on my exploration of the FormFillerAndroid codebase, here's a comprehensive overview:

## Project Overview

**FormFillerAndroid** (жҷәиғҪеЎ«иЎЁеҠ©жүӢ - "Smart Form Filler Assistant") is a Chinese-language Android application that intelligently extracts and auto-fills form fields from legal documents. It operates as both a custom Input Method Editor (IME) and an Autofill Service.

## What It Does

The app solves the problem of repeatedly filling out similar form fields by:
1. **Extracting fields** from pasted legal document text using regex patterns
2. **Storing profiles** - multiple named collections of field data (e.g., "Personal Info", "Company Details")
3. **Smart matching** - suggesting relevant fields when you tap into a form input based on field hints/labels
4. **Two input methods**:
   - Custom IME keyboard with field suggestions and expandable grid view
   - Android Autofill Service for automatic form population

## Tech Stack

- **Language**: Kotlin
- **Build System**: Gradle (Kotlin DSL)
- **Android SDK**: Target API 34, Min API 26 (Android 8.0+)
- **Architecture**: MVVM-inspired with coroutines
- **Database**: Room ORM with SQLite
- **UI Framework**: AndroidX (AppCompat, RecyclerView, Lifecycle)
- **JSON**: Gson
- **Kotlin Version**: 1.9.20
- **Gradle Plugin**: Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0, KSP 1.9.20-1.0.14

## Project Structure

```
D:\1233\FormFillerAndroid/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ app/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/main/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ java/com/formfiller/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ App.kt                          # Application class
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ AppDatabase.kt              # Room database singleton
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Entities.kt                 # Profile & Field data classes
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Daos.kt                     # ProfileDao & FieldDao
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ime/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FieldFillerIME.kt           # Custom IME service
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FormFillerAutofillService.kt # Autofill service
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FieldExtractor.kt           # Regex-based field extraction
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FieldMatcher.kt             # Smart field matching logic
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ FieldChipAdapter.kt         # RecyclerView adapter for IME
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ui/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ MainActivity.kt             # Main UI activity
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ FieldRowAdapter.kt          # RecyclerView adapter for main UI
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ res/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ activity_main.xml           # Main activity layout
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ime_keyboard.xml            # IME keyboard layout
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ item_field_chip.xml         # Field chip item
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ item_field_row.xml          # Field row item
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ autofill_item.xml           # Autofill presentation
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ values/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ colors.xml                  # Song dynasty-inspired color palette
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ strings.xml                 # String resources
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ themes.xml
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ xml/

в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ autofill_service.xml        # Autofill service config
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AndroidManifest.xml
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ build.gradle.kts

в”ңв”Җв”Җ settings.gradle.kts
в””в”Җв”Җ gradle.properties
```

## Key Components

### Data Layer (Room Database)
- **Profile**: Named collections of fields (id, name, createdAt)
- **Field**: Individual form fields with label, value, and type (name, id_number, phone, address, company, postal, text)
- **DAOs**: Async and sync query methods for both entities

### IME Service (FieldFillerIME.kt)
- Displays matched fields horizontally at top
- Shows all fields in expandable 3-column grid
- Profile navigation (previous/next buttons)
- Commits field values to input connection on tap
- Loads profiles and fields synchronously (allowed in IME context)

### Autofill Service (FormFillerAutofillService.kt)
- Parses form structure from AssistStructure
- Extracts field hints from autofill hints, labels, text, IDs, and HTML attributes
- Matches stored fields to form fields using type-based and text-based matching
- Returns FillResponse with datasets for each profile

### Field Extraction (FieldExtractor.kt)
- Regex patterns for: ID numbers, phone numbers, postal codes, addresses, company names
- Role extraction: plaintiff, defendant, representative, legal representative
- Chinese surname validation to filter false positives
- Returns ExtractedField objects with label, value, and type

### Field Matching (FieldMatcher.kt)
- Scores fields based on type match (10 points) and label text match (5 points)
- Returns sorted list of matched fields or all fields if no matches
- Used by IME to suggest relevant fields

### UI (MainActivity.kt)
- Profile management (create, delete, switch)
- Manual field addition
- Text extraction from pasted legal documents
- Field list display with delete functionality
- Buttons to enable IME and Autofill services

## Design Aesthetics

The app uses a **Song Dynasty-inspired color palette**:
- Paper: #F5F0E8 (cream background)
- Wood: #8B4513 (brown headers)
- Celadon: #5B7F5B (green accents)
- Gold: #C4956A (warm highlights)
- Ink: #3C2415 (dark text)

## Key Features

1. **Multi-profile support** - Store different sets of form data
2. **Smart extraction** - Automatically parse legal documents for common fields
3. **Dual input methods** - IME keyboard + Autofill Service
4. **Type-aware matching** - Different matching logic for different field types
5. **Expandable UI** - IME keyboard with collapsible full field grid
6. **Error resilience** - Silent error handling to prevent crashes

```
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ autofill_service.xml        # Autofill service config
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AndroidManifest.xml
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ build.gradle.kts

в”ңв”Җв”Җ settings.gradle.kts
в””в”Җв”Җ gradle.properties
```

## Key Components

### Data Layer (Room Database)
- **Profile**: Named collections of fields (id, name, createdAt)
- **Field**: Individual form fields with label, value, and type (name, id_number, phone, address, company, postal, text)
- **DAOs**: Async and sync query methods for both entities

### IME Service (FieldFillerIME.kt)
- Displays matched fields horizontally at top
- Shows all fields in expandable 3-column grid
- Profile navigation (previous/next buttons)
- Commits field values to input connection on tap
- Loads profiles and fields synchronously (allowed in IME context)

### Autofill Service (FormFillerAutofillService.kt)
- Parses form structure from AssistStructure
- Extracts field hints from autofill hints, labels, text, IDs, and HTML attributes
- Matches stored fields to form fields using type-based and text-based matching
- Returns FillResponse with datasets for each profile

### Field Extraction (FieldExtractor.kt)
- Regex patterns for: ID numbers, phone numbers, postal codes, addresses, company names
- Role extraction: plaintiff, defendant, representative, legal representative
- Chinese surname validation to filter false positives
- Returns ExtractedField objects with label, value, and type

### Field Matching (FieldMatcher.kt)
- Scores fields based on type match (10 points) and label text match (5 points)
- Returns sorted list of matched fields or all fields if no matches
- Used by IME to suggest relevant fields

### UI (MainActivity.kt)
- Profile management (create, delete, switch)
- Manual field addition
- Text extraction from pasted legal documents
- Field list display with delete functionality
- Buttons to enable IME and Autofill services

## Design Aesthetics

The app uses a **Song Dynasty-inspired color palette**:
- Paper: #F5F0E8 (cream background)
- Wood: #8B4513 (brown headers)
- Celadon: #5B7F5B (green accents)
- Gold: #C4956A (warm highlights)
- Ink: #3C2415 (dark text)

## Key Features

1. **Multi-profile support** - Store different sets of form data
2. **Smart extraction** - Automatically parse legal documents for common fields
3. **Dual input methods** - IME keyboard + Autofill Service
4. **Type-aware matching** - Different matching logic for different field types
5. **Expandable UI** - IME keyboard with collapsible full field grid
6. **Error resilience** - Silent error handling to prevent crashes

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/song_paper">

    <!-- жЎЈжЎҲйҖүжӢ©ж Ҹ -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="36dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:paddingHorizontal="8dp"
        android:background="@color/song_wood">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvProfile"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="й»ҳи®ӨжЎЈжЎҲ"
            android:textColor="@color/song_paper"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:singleLine="true" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnPrevProfile"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_media_previous"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="дёҠдёҖдёӘжЎЈжЎҲ" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnNextProfile"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_media_next"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="дёӢдёҖдёӘжЎЈжЎҲ" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnSwitchKeyboard"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="еҲҮжҚўй”®зӣҳ" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- еӯ—ж®өе»әи®®жқЎ -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rvFields"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingHorizontal="4dp"
        android:clipToPadding="false" />

    <!-- е…ЁйғЁеӯ—ж®өзҪ‘ж ј -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rvAllFields"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="160dp"
        android:padding="4dp"
        android:visibility="gone"
        android:clipToPadding="false" />

    <!-- еә•йғЁж“ҚдҪңж Ҹ -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="36dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:paddingHorizontal="8dp"

            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"

            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" />

        <View
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_weight="1" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvHint"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:textColor="@color/song_ink"
            android:textSize="11sp"
            android:alpha="0.6" />
    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

content.text: и®©жҲ‘еҶҚзңӢзңӢ MainActivity дёӯеҗҜз”Ёиҫ“е…Ҙжі•зҡ„зӣёе…ід»Јз ҒпјҢд»ҘеҸҠе…¶д»–еҸҜиғҪеҪұе“Қ IME зҡ„йғЁеҲҶгҖӮ

жҲ‘е·Із»ҸйҖҡиҜ»дәҶж•ҙдёӘ IME зӣёе…ізҡ„д»Јз ҒгҖӮд»ҘдёӢжҳҜжҲ‘еҸ‘зҺ°зҡ„й—®йўҳпјҡ

<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/song_paper">

    <!-- жЎЈжЎҲйҖүжӢ©ж Ҹ -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="36dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:paddingHorizontal="8dp"
        android:background="@color/song_wood">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvProfile"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="й»ҳи®ӨжЎЈжЎҲ"
            android:textColor="@color/song_paper"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:singleLine="true" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnPrevProfile"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_media_previous"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="дёҠдёҖдёӘжЎЈжЎҲ" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnNextProfile"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_media_next"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="дёӢдёҖдёӘжЎЈжЎҲ" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnSwitchKeyboard"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_sort_by_size"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless"
            android:contentDescription="еҲҮжҚўй”®зӣҳ" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- еӯ—ж®өе»әи®®жқЎ -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rvFields"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingHorizontal="4dp"
        android:clipToPadding="false" />

    <!-- е…ЁйғЁеӯ—ж®өзҪ‘ж ј -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rvAllFields"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="160dp"
        android:padding="4dp"
        android:visibility="gone"
        android:clipToPadding="false" />

    <!-- еә•йғЁж“ҚдҪңж Ҹ -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="42dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:paddingHorizontal="8dp"
        android:background="@color/song_light_wood">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnExpand"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="еұ•ејҖ в–І"
            android:textColor="@color/song_ink"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvHint"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:textColor="@color/song_ink"
            android:textSize="11sp"
            android:alpha="0.6" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnBackspace"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="вҢ«"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:paddingHorizontal="14dp"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground"
            android:textColor="@color/song_ink" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnEnter"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="вҶө"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:paddingHorizontal="14dp"
            android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground"
            android:textColor="@color/song_ink" />
    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>
